allow: Bash(git commit -m 'docs: archive v0.7 change and update roadmap milestone status *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(web\): centralize API base URL configuration *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: update domain references to vigilafrica.org *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs\(openapi\): add endpoint tags and schema descriptions *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(docs\): replace Swagger UI with Scalar API reference *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(docs\): replace Swagger UI with Scalar + fix map marker XSS + add /docs route *)
Bash(git commit -m 'database: add missing down migrations for versions 1-6 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'build: fix api:dev npm script to run from api directory *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(docs\): escape JSON in Scalar configuration *)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, re; content = sys.stdin.read\(\); match = re.search\(r'\\"customCss\\": \\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"', content\); print\('Found multi-line CSS' if '\\n' in match.group\(1\) else 'Fixed: CSS is single-line'\) if match else print\('customCss not found'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json, re; content = sys.stdin.read\(\); match = re.search\(r\\"data-configuration='{\(.*?\)}'\\", content, re.DOTALL\); obj = json.loads\('{' + match.group\(1\) + '}'\) if match else None; print\('✓ Valid JSON with single-line CSS' if obj and '\\\\n' not in obj.get\('customCss', ''\) else '✗ Invalid JSON or multi-line CSS'\) if obj else print\('Could not parse JSON'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Status: {data['status']}, Version: {data['version']}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Ghana:', d['data'][0]['country_name'] if d['data'] else 'no data', '| total:', d['meta']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Nigeria:', d['data'][0]['country_name'] if d['data'] else 'no data', '| total:', d['meta']['total']\)")
